user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
**Draft Follow-up Message:**

Hi [Customer's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to follow up on the ticket we resolved 5 days ago to check in and see if everything is still working smoothly for you.

If the solution is holding up and you're not experiencing any further issues, that's wonderful! If anything has changed or if you need additional help, please just reply to this message—I'm happy to assist right away.

Thank you again for your patience, and have a great day.

Best regards,  
Compass  
Customer Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly fulfilled the user's request by providing a professional and empathetic follow-up message draft that aligns with its defined persona and behavioral guidelines.
